chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 119 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 04.03.2024 Mr. Mansoor Hussian Maitlo, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Abdul Salam Shaikh, Advocate for respondents No.7 to 19. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioners, under instructions, does not press this petitioner, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
